summary: Iteration 2 testing of CPaaS Hub new features. Backend: 40/40 pytest cases pass (12 new tests added for change-password, list PATCH, /export/contacts.csv, campaign detail, provider credentials GET masked / PUT merge-preserve / agent forbidden / mock test / 404). Frontend: 13/13 Playwright assertions pass — Lists CRUD as super_admin, Contacts CSV export download, Contacts/Templates edit dialog prefill, Providers credentials dialog (twilio schema account_sid+auth_token+from, reveal toggle, save+mask-on-reopen showing ••••9999, mock test connection succeeds), Campaign detail page navigation, Settings change-password validation (mismatched confirm + wrong current pwd both surface errors), agent role correctly hides Lists/Team sidebar links and Credentials buttons on Providers.

minor.issue: Returns 200 (not 201) for creation — acceptable but not REST-idiomatic
After password rotation existing JWTs remain valid until expiry — no token revocation on password change

ui_bugs.issue: Pre-existing console warning width(-1)/height(-1) on initial render

ui_bugs.component: Multiple Dialogs (Lists, Providers, Contacts, Templates, CredentialsDialog)
ui_bugs.issue: Radix DialogContent emits 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' warnings — accessibility nit

action_items: Optional: invalidate active JWTs server-side when /auth/change-password succeeds (track token version per user)
Optional: add aria-describedby / <DialogDescription> to all Radix dialogs to silence a11y warnings
Carry-over: set fixed height or minWidth/minHeight on Dashboard Recharts ResponsiveContainer to silence width(-1) warnings
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1080 lines — increasingly hard to maintain. Strong recommendation to split into routers (auth.py, contacts.py, lists.py, templates.py, campaigns.py, providers.py, messages.py, dashboard.py).

SENSITIVE_KEYS uses substring matching on the field key name (any key containing 'key','secret','token','password','sid','auth'). The substring 'key' is broad — e.g. 'monkey_field' would be masked. Consider exact-match or a configurable allow-list per provider schema.
PUT /providers/{id}/credentials does a merge keyed by sent fields only — there is no way to delete an existing credential field via API (only overwrite). Add explicit unset support if needed.

GET /providers/{id}/credentials returns mask using bullet char '•' but the masked length equals original secret length (could leak length information). Consider a fixed mask like '••••XXXX' regardless of length.
/api/export/contacts.csv has no row limit beyond .to_list(10000) and no streaming — large tenants could OOM. Consider StreamingResponse with chunked CSV writer.
CSV export does not escape custom_fields.city safely if it contains commas — csv.writer handles quoting but tags list is joined with ',' inside a single cell which may be ambiguous to consumers.
Change-password endpoint enforces min length 6 only — no complexity rules; carry-over from iteration 1.
test_credentials: admin@cpaas.io / Admin@12345 (super_admin), agent@cpaas.io / Agent@12345 (agent) — both verified working. Note: tests temporarily change admin password and revert at end of TestChangePassword class.
seed_data_creation: Auto-seeded on startup (unchanged from iteration 1). Test-suite creates and self-cleans TEST_ prefixed contacts/lists/templates/providers. Provider credentials are written onto seeded Twilio (Mock) provider during tests — values left masked but harmless since mock=True.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py now covers 40 tests across Auth, ChangePassword, Dashboard, Contacts, Lists (incl. PATCH), Export CSV, Templates, Campaigns (incl. detail + 404), Messages, Conversations, Calls, Providers (incl. credentials GET masked / PUT merge-preserve / agent 403 / mock test / 404), Webhooks, Usage. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. All data-testid attributes are present on Lists, Providers (incl. cred-{field}, reveal-{field}, cred-test-button, cred-save-button), Settings (old/new/confirm-password-input, save-password-button), Contacts (export-contacts-button), Templates, CampaignDetail. Provider credentials are masked with bullet char '•' (Unicode) — last 4 chars preserved. Sending back masked value in PUT preserves existing secret (verified). Mock provider /test always returns ok=true with random latency_ms.
rca of the issue: N/A — all features tested working as specified. Frontend false-negatives in first Playwright run were caused by overly specific href= selectors and a fragile twilio-card detection heuristic; switched to text-based selectors and confirmed all flows work.
